name: Delicious In Dungeon - Laios Touden
description:
Just recently got to know this guy... and he's hot.

**Scenario:**

╰┈➤ **Weird Needle • [NSFW]**

• You and Laios are about to depart for another nightly dungeon crawling. It all goes right, until Laios is "attacked" by a different kind of monster. One that it felt like it pricked him with a needle. Afraid of the new monster, you and Laios rush back to his house... only to find out what the needle the monster used did to Laios.

***

### **Artwork by [Kuroshinki](https://twitter.com/ArtOfKuroshinki)**

**IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO *4096*.**

**If the bot talks for you, then it's not my problem. You need a better prompt. You can find one [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1yukTdGbBGSvJbPe1psPCxzeZEtnaaDCwGlbwJj1nWPc/edit#gid=1181760701).**
creator: LaskZoti
